title: For the Crown
description:
For the Crown is a puzzle logistics builder where every building placement matters.

Guide lemming-like workers through increasingly complex production chains as you transform a small island into a thriving kingdom. Gather resources, manufacture valuable goods and expand your castle while working within one important limitation:

The island never gets bigger! Your logistics problems do!

Every new building consumes valuable space. Every production chain creates new logistical challenges. The more successful your kingdom becomes, the harder it becomes to keep everything organized.

What starts as a small settlement gradually turns into a dense network of workers, resources and production lines competing for the same limited space.

Workers With Minds Of Their OwnWorkers are not directly controlled.

Once spawned, they simply walk forward until they encounter roads, signs, stairways or buildings.

Like tiny medieval lemmings, they depend entirely on the systems you create for them.

A well-designed kingdom runs smoothly.

A poorly designed kingdom quickly turns into complete chaos.

Create Production ChainsTransform simple resources into increasingly valuable products.

Connect dozens of buildings together to create efficient production networks and unlock new opportunities for expanding your castle.

As production grows, so does the complexity of your logistics.

Limited Space, Unlimited ProblemsThe biggest challenge is often your own kingdom.

Buildings cannot simply be moved around, and the island offers only limited room for expansion.

A shortcut that seems useful today may become an obstacle tomorrow. A perfect layout can slowly evolve into a logistical nightmare.

The key to success is using space efficiently, building vertically and keeping your workers moving as smoothly as possible.

Expand Your CastleDeliver valuable goods to your castle and unlock new building tiers, resources and production chains.

Each upgrade opens new opportunities while placing greater demands on your growing logistics network.

Castle SpecializationsChoose between four different castle types, each offering unique advantages as your kingdom expands.

Each specialization encourages different production priorities and rewards alternative approaches to building your economy.

What For the Crown Offers• Puzzle-focused logistics gameplay

• Lemming-inspired worker mechanics

• 38 interconnected production chains

• 4 unique castle specializations

• Vertical construction with stairways, platforms and drop routes

• Limited building space that rewards careful planning

• Increasing complexity driven by player decisions

• Relaxing gameplay with deep optimization challenges

• A unique blend of factory building and puzzle solving

Build your production network, expand your castle and discover just how efficient your kingdom can become.
description_short: A puzzle logistics builder where lemming-like workers transport resources across a limited island. Create production chains, optimize routes, upgrade your castle and solve increasingly complex space and logistics challenges. The island never gets bigger. Your logistics problems do.
